facebook.caption:
4.3 stars. 522 reviews. For a grocery store.

Kingkong Mart on Đường Bạch Đằng is where locals actually shop. Grab snacks, water, sunscreen, and local drinks before hitting the beach. Skip the resort minibar markup. This is your base camp for supplies in Phu Quoc.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
